description: This design forward template is the perfect way  for a winery, wine shop, or business to generate enthusiasm about their wines and events. There is plenty of customizable space to share photos, reviews, content, promotions, and events. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.
